---
title: "Service"
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-title: " "
---

## Editorial

- **Associate Editor**, [*Risk Management and Insurance Review*](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/15406296) (2025–present).
- Editor Search Committee, *Journal of Insurance Issues* (2025).
- Donald Hardigree Memorial Award Committee, *Journal of Insurance Issues* (2021).

## Journal Reviewing

Ad-hoc reviewer for *Accounting Forum*, *Applied Economics*, *Geneva Papers on Risk and Insurance—Issues and Practice*, *Journal of Contingencies and Crisis Management*, *Journal of Financial Research*, *Journal of Insurance Issues*, *Journal of Insurance Regulation*, *Journal of Risk and Insurance*, *North American Actuarial Journal*, *Risk Management and Insurance Review*, *Risks*, and *The Financial Review*.

Additional reviews:

- Chapter reviewer, *Handbook of Insurance*, 3rd Edition (Georges Dionne, Editor).
- Grant reviewer, Swiss National Science Foundation (SNSF).

## Professional Associations

**American Accounting Association (AAA)**

- Reviewer, Annual Meeting (2020).

**American Risk and Insurance Association (ARIA)**

- Chair, Kulp-Wright Book Award Committee (2026); member (2020, 2023, 2025).
- Member, Nomination Committee (2022).
- Member, Hagen Family Foundation Travel Award Committee (2018, 2020).
- Member, Program Committee (2020, 2023–2026).
- Member, World Risk and Insurance Economics Congress Best Paper Award Committee (2020).

**Canadian Academic Accounting Association (CAAA)**

- Reviewer, Annual Conference (2021).

**Financial Accounting and Reporting Section (FARS)**

- Reviewer, Midyear Meeting (2021).

**Financial Management Association (FMA)**

- Member, Annual Meeting Program Committee (2016–2017, 2021).

**Hawaii Accounting Research Conference (HARC)**

- Reviewer (2019).

**[Southern Risk and Insurance Association (SRIA)](https://southernrisk.org/)**

- Secretary (2025–2026).
- Board Member (2019–2021, 2024–2025).

## University Service (Florida State University)

- Member, Wertheim College Research Awards Committee (2026).
- Member, College of Business Scholarship Committee (2023–2025).
- Member, RMI Hiring Committee — Assistant Professor (2023–2024).
- Chair, RMI Center Executive Director Search Committee (2022–2023).
- Member, RMI Hiring Committee — Assistant/Associate Professor (2021–2022).
- Chair, College of Business Research Awards Committee (2020–2022).
- Member, Faculty Evaluation Committee (2020).
- Member, MS-RMI Admissions Committee (2018–present).
- Member, RMI Hiring Committee — Specialized Faculty (2018–2019).
- Member, RMI Hiring Committee — Assistant/Associate Professor (2017–2018).
- Member, RMI Curriculum Committee (2017–present).

**Organizer, Spencer Risk Manager on Campus (RMOC) Program**

- Tracy Hwang, Director, Risk Management, Instacart (2023).
- Lori R. Badenhop, Senior Manager, International Risk Management, Carrier Global Corporation (2022).
- Barry A. Dillard, Vice President, Risk Management Services, Walt Disney Parks & Resorts (2021).
- Michael D. Phillipus, Director of Risk Management, Occidental Petroleum Corporation (2020).

## Doctoral Committees

**Florida State University**

- Gabriel Carrillo, Risk Management and Insurance — Committee Member (Graduated 2025: University of Central Florida).
- William D. Cather, Accounting — Committee Member (Graduated 2025: Oklahoma State University).
- Dana Telljohann, Risk Management and Insurance — Committee Member (Graduated 2025: University of Cincinnati).

**External**

- Yuchen Qi, Finance, University of North Texas.
- Dan Yang, Risk Management and Insurance, University of Georgia (Graduated 2022: Troy University).

## Professional Memberships

American Accounting Association (AAA) · American Real Estate and Urban Economics Association (AREUEA) · American Risk and Insurance Association (ARIA) · Financial Management Association (FMA) · Risk Theory Society (RTS) · Southern Risk and Insurance Association (SRIA) · Western Risk and Insurance Association (WRIA).
